title: Toile Craft
description: Just some cool stuff, created with MCreator.
body:
**Toile Craft is a Mod created by LTeam.**

**Available Languages : English (US) / French (French).**

The mod contains 3 types of objects, Toile, Nethium and Endium objects (armors, tools, dimensions,...).

Created With [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/).

For more information please see the Wiki [here](https://toilecraft.blogspot.com/).

FAQ:

- Can I include Toile Craft Mod in my mod pack?

- Of course!

- I have an issue / bug / crash / report / request, where can I send it?

- On the [Toile Craft Discord](https://discord.gg/WcsqwSKuHw).
